title: Dripstone Decor
description: Adds new slabs, stairs, and walls for a few vanilla blocks that lack them.
body: Dripstone Decor aims to enhance your building possibilities by adding stairs, slabs, and walls for vanilla blocks including but not limited to dripstone, calcite, smooth basalt, and gilded blackstone. These new blocks are crafted in the same way as their vanilla counterparts; you can use a crafting table or a stonecutter to obtain them.
